title: WTW plc (WTW) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for WTW plc based on stable, recurring free cash flows.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate
fcfGrowth.rationale: Given the recent negative revenue growth trajectory (-3.3%) but robust free cash flow of 1,919,374,976, we assume a conservative forward FCF growth rate of 5%. The firm benefits from sticky client relationships and a capital-light model.
